<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
$FNC-COST$ = 8250; 3250; 7500; 20000; 35000; 75000
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 4000; 1000; 2750; 9000; 20000; 42500
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 1; 4;
$FNC-PVP-DETECTION$ = ; ; 2
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Radar; Stronger Ammunition; Dual Turret; Even Heavier Ammo
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = File:Radar.png; File:Radar.png; File:Turret3.png; File:Turret4.png; File:Turret5.png
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
!Level
!Total Price
!Damage
!Firerate
!Range
!DPS
!Cost Efficiency
|-
|0
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|20
|0.4
|15
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|1
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|20
|0.3
|20
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|2
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|30
|0.3
|20
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|3
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|40
|0.16
|22
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|4
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|65
|0.16
|24
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|5
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|78
|0.12
|27
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
!Level
!Total Price
!Damage
!Firerate
!Range
!DPS
!Cost Efficiency
|-
|0
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|10
|0.35
|16.5
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|1
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|10
|0.3
|21
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|2
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|15
|0.3
|21
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|3
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|15
|0.15
|23
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|4
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|32
|0.15
|24.5
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|5
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|55
|0.12
|26.5
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
